summary: A Shinchan endless runner game where Shinchan runs towards chocobi chips, collecting points while avoiding obstacles
architectural_notes: Keyboard and mouse input handling for dual control scheme
Dynamic difficulty scaling based on score/time
imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- Shinchan character sprite in running pose, anime style with his signature red shirt and yellow shorts (shinchan-running.dim_128x128.png)
- Chocobi chocolate chip snack illustration, small yellow package with cartoon face (chocobi-chip.dim_64x64.png)
- Rock obstacle, simple cartoon stone with shading (obstacle-rock.dim_80x80.png)
- Puddle obstacle, blue water splash with cartoon style (obstacle-puddle.dim_100x60.png)
- Scrolling background with Japanese neighborhood scenery, bright and colorful (game-background.dim_1920x600.png)

existing_features.title: Create a side-scrolling endless runner game where Shinchan character runs continuously from left to right across the screen
Implement chocobi chip collectibles that spawn randomly along the running path, which Shinchan can collect for points
Add obstacles (rocks and puddles) that spawn randomly and cause game over if Shinchan collides with them
Implement progressive difficulty system where game speed increases as player collects more chocobi chips
Implement dual control system supporting both keyboard arrow keys (up/down or jump) and mouse clicks for controlling Shinchan's movement
Create score tracking system that displays current points, increments with each chocobi chip collected, and shows final score on game over
Design a cohesive visual theme inspired by the Shinchan anime aesthetic with playful colors, cartoon-style graphics, and cheerful UI elements that match the lighthearted tone of the game
Display generated character and game asset images as static assets from frontend/public/assets/generated directory

new_feature_requests.summary: Side-scrolling gameplay with Shinchan running left-to-right
Chocobi chips to collect for points
Progressive difficulty - game speeds up over time
Dual control support - keyboard arrow keys and mouse clicks
Score tracking system for collected chips
